aboutSection.title: About me
aboutSection.subtitle: Technology Analyst | Junior Developer
aboutSection.description:
With nearly 6 years of professional experience, I blend analytical rigor from my administrative background with the agility of Software Engineering.
 My current focus is on Front-end development using TypeScript and Next.js, alongside UI/UX design in Figma and GCP infrastructure. I am currently expanding into Back-end development, aiming to master efficient API creation and scalable systems with Java.

stackSection.title: Technologies & Tools
stackSection.subtitle: My toolbox is carefully selected to ensure performance and scalability.

stackSection.desc_nodejs: JavaScript runtime environment on the server side
